## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `composer ci:check` locally (or explain why not)
- [ ] I ran `composer analyse` when PHP files changed
- [ ] I ran `npm run build` when frontend files changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I did not change routes, authorization, or database schema unless this PR explicitly requires it
- [ ] I updated documentation for setup or deployment changes
